# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and deploy on Pull Request

on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  NPM_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_AUTH_TOKEN }}

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build and deploy
        env:
          PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
          PR_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
        run: |
          echo "PR Title: ${PR_TITLE}"
          echo "PR Description: ${PR_DESCRIPTION}"

          # Use the PR title in commit messages
          npm config set registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/
          npm publish --tag ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}

          # Send notification to Slack
          curl -X POST \
            https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage \
            -H 'Authorization: Bearer ${SLACK_API_TOKEN}' \
            -d '{"channel": "${CHANNEL}", "text": "PR \${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} has been deployed. Check the release notes for more information."}'

      - name: Notify PR author
        env:
          PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
        run: |
          echo "Deployment notification sent to @${PR_AUTHOR}"
